ValidationRule.description: Prevents users from directly editing business address fields. Address changes require payment of $50 and must be submitted through the official Request Address Change process.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISCHANGED(Business_Street__c), ISCHANGED(Business_City__c), ISCHANGED(Business_State__c), ISCHANGED(Business_Postal_Code__c), ISCHANGED(Business_Country__c) ), NOT($Setup.Bypass_Validation__c.Allow_Address_Change__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Address changes require approval and payment of $50. Please use the 'Request Address Change' button to submit your request through the official process.
